steps: "Contact ABN AMRO Custody to confirm they applied 25% Dutch withholding tax instead of the 15% NL-NO treaty rate on Unilever NV dividend",
"Request ABN AMRO file treaty relief claim with Dutch tax authorities for the EUR 22,193.60 excess withholding",
"If custodian cannot recover, file direct refund claim with Belastingdienst using IB 92 form for NL-NO treaty benefits",
"Submit Norwegian tax residence certificate and treaty claim documentation to support the 15% rate application"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
